title: The Deb
overview: High school outcast Taylah Simpkins is certain that the upcoming Debutante Ball ‘the Deb,’ is her one chance to redefine herself and become the popular girl once and for all.  When her cynical cousin from the city, Maeve, is sent to Taylah’s small farm town as punishment, she thinks the ball is a farce and immediately tries to disrupt the status quo.  In their search for the spotlight, Taylah and Maeve dig deep to find self-acceptance – and a date to the Deb.
